meta-description: Learn about state medical assistance offices by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: State medical assistance office
excerpt: A state agency in charge of the state's Medicaid program and can give information about programs in its state that help pay medical bills for people with limited income and resources.
content: A state agency in charge of the state's Medicaid program and can give information about programs in its state that help pay medical bills for people with limited income and resources.
